docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,169.49 FILED BY WOODWORTH, MARK CHRISTIAN AS TO DEFENDANT MORAN, ELIZABETH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-03-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00 SERVED AUG-14-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MORAN, ELIZABETH
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOODWORTH, MARK CHRISTIAN
DECLARATION REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOODWORTH, MARK CHRISTIAN
ORDER REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM-GRANTED BY REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-03-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-03-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MARK CHRISTIAN WOODWORTH IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT ELIZABETH MORAN IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-03-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOODWORTH, MARK CHRISTIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORAN, ELIZABETH $2,169.49 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,269.49 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
